message:
fix(command): WrongSubcommandArity must use 'command' suffix to match upstream (br-frankenredis-v4x3)

Upstream Redis uses `wrong number of arguments for '%s' command` with the
subcommand fullname (e.g. acl|whoami, xgroup|create) — see server.c:3792
and acl.c:3033. FrankenRedis had a special case that switched the suffix
to "subcommand" for acl / slowlog / xgroup / xinfo, which two tests
caught: lua_eval::tests::acl_admin_subcommands_reject_from_scripts_after_validation
and tests::wrong_subcommand_arity_formats_redis_families_with_expected_wording.

Live probe against vendored legacy_redis_code/redis (redis_version 7.2.4)
confirms every family ends in " command" unconditionally:
  ACL WHOAMI extra  -> ERR ... 'acl|whoami' command
  ACL SETUSER       -> ERR ... 'acl|setuser' command
  XGROUP CREATE     -> ERR ... 'xgroup|create' command
  XINFO STREAM      -> ERR ... 'xinfo|stream' command

Fix: collapse the match to the unconditional "command" suffix and inline
the two to_ascii_lowercase() calls. No other call sites affected (all
WrongSubcommandArity constructions route through this ResP formatting).

Verified: fr-command test suite now 605 passed / 1 failed (was 603/3);
the remaining failure is frankenredis-j4vq (orthogonal — test expects
Integer(0) while impl correctly returns BulkString(None) per pinned
upstream-oracle evidence).

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
